# Vendored: Apache Commons Lang 3

**This directory contains source code copied verbatim from Apache Commons Lang.**
It is used as the subject application for code quality analysis experiments
(PMD, Checkstyle, JaCoCo, SpotBugs).  No modifications have been made to the
copied source.

| Field       | Value                                                       |
|-------------|-------------------------------------------------------------|
| Project     | Apache Commons Lang                                         |
| Version     | 3.21.0-SNAPSHOT (main branch, shallow clone)               |
| Source URL  | https://github.com/apache/commons-lang                      |
| License     | Apache License 2.0 (see LICENSE.txt in this directory)      |
| Copied on   | 2026-04-24                                                  |

The original LICENSE.txt and NOTICE.txt from the upstream project are retained
in this directory unchanged, as required by the Apache License 2.0.
